sizing_rule.note: Apply optimal f at portfolio level across diversified systems with different correlations, not at individual system level. Position sizing should reflect optimal diversification mix rather than single-system optimal f. Specific percentage not provided in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Use diversification across multiple market systems to reduce drawdowns and allow more trading trials at optimal f level, while acknowledging that optimal f trading at portfolio level requires finding the optimal diversification mix among systems.
